title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SENTENCE IMPROVEMENT 1 100 BY @

questions.question: Q1. The General have ordered that the troops should move immediately.
questions.explanation: 'The General' (Singular Subject) के साथ Singular Verb **'has'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q2. As she kept walking to me, my heart skipped a beat.
options: As she kept walking within me
As she kept walking from me
As she kept walking towards me
questions.explanation: दिशा (Direction) बताने के लिए **'towards'** (की ओर) Preposition का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q3. As soon as we went for an afternoon siesta, my pet rabbit Tia digged a huge hole right in the middle of the lawn.
options: my pet rabbit Tia digged a huge hole
my pet rabbit Tia dug a huge hole
my pet rabbit Tia did dig a huge hole
my pet rabbit Tia has dug a huge hole
questions.explanation: Verb 'dig' की Past form (V2) **'dug'** होती है, **'digged'** नहीं.

questions.question: Q4. Investing on real estate can earn you quick profit but it comes with a certain amount of risk attached to it.
questions.explanation: 'Invest' के साथ **'in'** Preposition (Phrasal Verb: 'invest in') का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q5. When the villagers put up a firm resistance to the fearsome bandit with all their might, he ultimately fleed the spot.
questions.explanation: Verb 'flee' (भाग जाना) की Past form (V2) **'fled'** होती है, **'fleed'** नहीं.

questions.question: Q6. He wished he has more resources to support the poor.
options: He wished he would have more resources
He wished he have more resources
He wished he had more resources
He wished he would had more resources
questions.explanation: **Wish** व्यक्त करने वाले वाक्य में **Subjunctive Mood** के लिए **Past Perfect ('had')** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q7. little did him know that the results will come out worse than expected.
questions.explanation: 'Did' के बाद **Subjective Pronoun 'he'** का प्रयोग होगा, न कि Objective Pronoun 'him'.

questions.question: Q8. Me and my friends often go to the cinema together.
questions.explanation: Positive sentence में Pronoun का क्रम **231** (2nd, 3rd person पहले, फिर 1st person 'I') होता है.

questions.question: Q9. There was an interesting article in the newspaper about the dangers to an environment.
questions.explanation: **'Environment'** (विशिष्ट संदर्भ) से पहले **Definite Article 'the'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q10. You and I have submitted your work on time.
questions.explanation: Subject **'You and I'** (हम दोनों) के लिए **Possessive Pronoun 'our'** (हमारा) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q11. Shall we go for walking in the park?
options: Shall we go for a walk
questions.explanation: 'Go for a walk' एक सही Phrasal Noun है.

questions.question: Q12. Among you and me she is quite rude to the boy.
questions.explanation: **दो** व्यक्तियों के लिए **'Between'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है, 'Among' नहीं.

questions.question: Q13. I find that I get myself tired very easily these days.
questions.explanation: Transitive verb 'get' के बाद **Reflexive Pronoun 'myself'** अनावश्यक है.

questions.question: Q14. If you have remained calm you could have saved the situation.
questions.explanation: **Third Conditional** Structure: **If + Subject + had + V3...**

questions.question: Q15. I will spend my rest of remaining life in my village.
questions.explanation: **'Rest'** और **'remaining'** का एक साथ प्रयोग **Superfluous** है. **'The rest of my life'** सही है.

questions.question: Q16. This dog seems to be very ferocious, otherwise, it is harmless.
questions.explanation: 'Ferocious' (हिंसक) और 'harmless' (अहानिकारक) विपरीत (contrasting) विचार हैं, इसलिए **'but'** Conjunction का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q17. The girl lay down on the bed besides her mother and went to sleep.
questions.explanation: **'Beside'** का अर्थ है **'बगल में'** (next to). 'Besides' का अर्थ 'के अलावा' (in addition to) होता है.

questions.question: Q18. He went to the bed with a slight fever.
questions.explanation: Phrasal verb 'go to bed' (सोने जाना) में **Article 'the'** का प्रयोग नहीं होता.

questions.question: Q19. The city turned out to be very different to what he had expected.
questions.explanation: Adjective **'different'** के साथ **'from'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है, 'to' नहीं.

questions.question: Q20. Your name precedes before mine in the list.
questions.explanation: **'Precedes'** (पहले आना) और **'before'** का अर्थ समान है, इसलिए **'before'** का प्रयोग अनावश्यक है (Superfluous).

questions.question: Q21. You should avail this opportunity to demonstrate your skills.
questions.explanation: 'Avail' के बाद **Reflexive Pronoun ('yourself')** और **'of'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q22. He was unable to help me because he had been failed to arrange the money.
questions.explanation: वाक्य **Simple Past Tense** में है, इसलिए **'had been failed'** के स्थान पर **'failed'** (V2) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q23. He often persists to ask awkward questions at the board meetings.
questions.explanation: Verb 'persist' के बाद **'in'** Preposition और **Gerund ($V_{ing}$)** का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q24. His son-in-laws have enhanced his business within a short period.
questions.explanation: Compound Noun **'son-in-law'** का Plural **'sons-in-law'** होता है, Suffix (in-law) में 's' नहीं लगता.

questions.question: Q25. Either of these two roads lead to the post office.
questions.explanation: **'Either of'** के बाद **Singular Verb ('leads')** का प्रयोग होता है (Subject-Verb Agreement).

questions.question: Q26. His father prevented him to go abroad for higher studies.
questions.explanation: Verb 'prevent' के साथ **'from'** Preposition और **Gerund ($V_{ing}$)** का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q27. What is the name of the Swami whom autobiography impressed you so much?
questions.explanation: **Possessive Pronoun 'whose'** (जिसका/जिसकी) का प्रयोग **'Swami'** के अधिकार (Autobiography) को दर्शाने के लिए होगा.

questions.question: Q28. The crowd of the migrant worker at the station for the Shramik Special is unforgettable.
questions.explanation: 'Crowd' (भीड़) कई लोगों के लिए होती है, इसलिए **Plural Noun 'workers'** का प्रयोग होगा. Article 'the' अनावश्यक है.

questions.question: Q29. Will you listen me when I tell you the details?
questions.explanation: Verb 'listen' के बाद **'to'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q30. The crow held back to the piece of bread with its claws.
questions.explanation: **'Held on'** (थामे रखना) Phrasal Verb का प्रयोग होगा, जो Context में सही है.

questions.question: Q31. The farmer is cutting the corn which has ripen in the fields.
questions.explanation: **'Has/Have'** के बाद **V3** (Past Participle) **'ripened'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q32. Obi wanted to continue on his idea of building a modern school.
questions.explanation: Verb 'continue' के साथ **'with'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q33. I was watching a whole scene very carefully.
questions.explanation: **'Whole scene'** (विशिष्ट दृश्य) से पहले **Definite Article 'the'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q34. Mr. Choudhri goes to fly to Germany and France next weekend.
questions.explanation: **'Next weekend'** (Future Action) के लिए **Present Continuous Tense** ('is going') का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q35. Not get into the car, it has not been cleaned inside.
questions.explanation: Imperative Sentence की शुरुआत में **'Do not'** का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q36. The man we met was any other than the original owner of the house.
questions.explanation: 'Any other' के स्थान पर **'different from'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q37. "You can meet me always you like," our teacher told us.
questions.explanation: Adverb **'always'** के स्थान पर **'anytime'** (कभी भी) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q38. There is no one else in this house; I can feel the presence.
questions.explanation: **'Presence'** (उपस्थिति) महसूस करने का अर्थ है **कोई मौजूद है**, इसलिए **'someone'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q39. You look very tired; you would go to bed now.
questions.explanation: **सुझाव (Suggestion)** देने के लिए **'should'** Modal Verb का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q40. The little baby cried loudly to a new toy.
questions.explanation: **'Cry for something'** (किसी चीज़ की माँग में रोना) सही Phrasal Verb है.

questions.question: Q41. This is the place here Sudhir found the wallet full of money.
questions.explanation: **स्थान (Place)** के लिए **'where'** Relative Adverb का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q42. Although we took all precautions but we were unable to avoid getting caught in the heavy rain.
questions.explanation: **'Although'** के साथ **'but'** Conjunction का प्रयोग अनावश्यक है.

questions.question: Q43. I'm sure that I found the place without any difficulty when I go next time.
questions.explanation: **'Next time'** (Future Tense) के लिए **'will find'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q44. Asking for and giving informations is an important feature of conversations.
questions.explanation: 'Information' **Uncountable Noun** है, जिसका Plural **'informations'** नहीं होता.

questions.question: Q55. Every country tries to do its good at the Olympic games as they are held in great prestige.
questions.explanation: Verb 'do' को modify करने के लिए **Adverb 'well/best'** का प्रयोग होगा (do one's best/well).

questions.question: Q46. Judy solved the difficult problem by her own without anyone's help.
questions.explanation: **"On her own"** (स्वयं/अपने दम पर) सही Idiom है.

questions.question: Q47. You must avoid riding in a crowded bus or travelling in a metro during rush hour as both are quiet unpleasant experiences.
options: as both are quiet unpleasant experiences
as both are quite unpleasant experiences
as both are quietly unpleasant experiences
as both are much unpleasant experiences
questions.explanation: Adverb **'quite'** (काफी/बहुत) का प्रयोग Adjective **'unpleasant'** को Modify करने के लिए होगा.

questions.question: Q48. Won't you please come to help me along this heavy box?
questions.explanation: मदद माँगने के लिए **'help me with'** (इस चीज़ में मदद करना) का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q49. The construction of the new business school is led to a sudden rise of population in our area.
questions.explanation: वाक्य **Present Perfect Tense** में है, इसलिए **'has led to'** (Present Perfect Active) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q50. When she went for a walk Maya couldn't take off her scarf because it was too much windy.
questions.explanation: 'Windy' एक Adjective है, इसलिए **'too much'** के स्थान पर केवल **'too'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q51. We don't really want a large house; we are looking for some comfort and some convenience on a moderate price.
questions.explanation: **Price (कीमत)** बताने के लिए **'at'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है (at a low/moderate/high price).

questions.question: Q52. Lalitha will go to sister's house in Mumbai this summer.
questions.explanation: Possessive Pronoun **'her'** (Lalitha के लिए) का प्रयोग आवश्यक है.

questions.question: Q53. Several prominent film stars have appeared on television on behalf of awareness about hand hygiene.
questions.explanation: **'On behalf of the awareness'** सही Phrase है.

questions.question: Q54. The concept became too much clear to me after my tutor showed me the diagram.
questions.explanation: **'Too much'** के स्थान पर **'too'** (Adverb) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q55. The balloon flew up as soon as the man cutting the string.
options: the man was cutting the string
the man had cut the string
questions.explanation: वाक्य **Simple Past Tense** ('flew') में है, इसलिए **'cut'** (V2) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q56. Mithila art tradition is passed on from one generation through a next by children watching and helping their mothers and grandmothers.
questions.explanation: **'From one...to the next'** (एक से दूसरे तक) सही Phrase है.

questions.question: Q57. Electric heaters were providing to all the officers at the guest house.
questions.explanation: वाक्य **Passive Voice** में है, इसलिए **'were provided'** (Past Continuous Passive) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q58. Einstein's school teachers thought he would never success in life.
questions.explanation: Modal Verb 'would' के बाद **Verb 'succeed'** (सफल होना) का प्रयोग होगा, न कि Noun 'success'.

questions.question: Q59. That man would have attacked you, if you went that way.
questions.explanation: **Third Conditional** Structure: **...would have + V3, if + Subject + had + V3** ('had gone').

questions.question: Q60. The government has announced a gradual reboot of air travel who was halted two months ago due to lockdown.
questions.explanation: **'Air travel'** (Non-living thing) के लिए **'which'** Relative Pronoun का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q61. Keep looking, and you are sure to find the meaning of the word on that page.
questions.explanation: दिया गया वाक्य **Grammatically सही** है.

questions.question: Q62. Most hotels offer for their guests complimentary breakfast during their stay there.
questions.explanation: Verb **'offer'** के बाद **Preposition 'for'** अनावश्यक है.

questions.question: Q63. How many is the fine for returning the books late?
questions.explanation: **'Fine'** (जुर्माना) **Uncountable Noun** है, इसलिए **'How much'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q64. At the workshop, they were taught how to nail the pieces of wood together to create toys.
options: they were taught how to nail
they were teaching how to nail
questions.explanation: दिया गया वाक्य **Grammatically सही** है.

questions.question: Q65. A probe has been ordered by the incident that occurred at the celebrations.
questions.explanation: **'Probe into'** (जांच करना) सही Phrasal Verb है.

questions.question: Q66. If you rent a house near your office, it will save you time as well as also money.
options: as well as also the money
questions.explanation: **'As well as'** Conjunction के साथ **'also'** का प्रयोग अनावश्यक है (Superfluous).

questions.question: Q67. Notwithstanding we were all busy that weekend we had to cancel the outing.
questions.explanation: **'Notwithstanding'** (के बावजूद) के स्थान पर **'Although'** (हालांकि) Conjunction का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q68. Every participant gave so outstanding performance that it became difficult to choose the winner.
questions.explanation: **Singular Countable Noun ('performance')** से पहले **'such an'** का प्रयोग होता है (Such + (a/an) + Adj + Noun).

questions.question: Q69. The need today is for both sides to introspect and re-examine the issue carefully and resolve it amicably.
options: The need today is for both sides
to introspect and re-examine the issue
questions.explanation: दिया गया वाक्य **Grammatically सही** है.

questions.question: Q70. Only five minutes are allowed for each speaker during the function.
questions.explanation: **'Five minutes'** (एक इकाई के रूप में) **Singular** माना जाएगा, इसलिए **'is allowed'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q71. You need to sign these important documents by ink.
questions.explanation: **'In ink'** (स्याही से) सही Idiomatic Phrase है.

questions.question: Q72. She speaks very highly of both her daughter-in-laws.
questions.explanation: Compound Noun **'daughter-in-law'** का Plural **'daughters-in-law'** होता है.

questions.question: Q73. His loyalty and honesty are above suspect.
questions.explanation: **'Above suspicion'** (संदेह से परे) सही Idiom है.

questions.question: Q74. Parul is ten years elder than her sibling.
questions.explanation: **'Elder'** के साथ **'to'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है, न कि 'than'.

questions.question: Q75. He is afraid from all insects that crawl.
questions.explanation: Adjective **'afraid'** के साथ **'of'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q76. He wanted to know the reason why his low score in Mathematics.
questions.explanation: Indirect Question में **Wh-word + Subject + Verb** क्रम होता है, इसलिए **'why his score was low'** सही है.

questions.question: Q77. This is only mistake he has made in the dictation.
questions.explanation: **'Only'** (सबसे महत्वपूर्ण या इकलौता) से पहले **Definite Article 'the'** का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q78. I am hearing a strange noise now.
questions.explanation: **Stative Verb 'hear'** का प्रयोग **Continuous Tense** में नहीं होता है.

questions.question: Q79. Do you earn so much to make both ends meet?
questions.explanation: 'Make both ends meet' (गुजारा करना) के संदर्भ में **'enough'** (पर्याप्त) का प्रयोग सही होगा.

questions.question: Q80. You cannot lead a healthy life although you stop smoking.
questions.explanation: **Conditional Conjunction 'unless'** (यदि नहीं) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q81. I had to hold on to the wall to steady itself or I could have fallen.
questions.explanation: Subject **'I'** के लिए **Reflexive Pronoun 'myself'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q82. The jury are from different parts of the country.
questions.explanation: **'Jury'** (एक इकाई के रूप में) **Singular** है, इसलिए **'is'** (Singular Verb) का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q83. She picked up the books lie on the table and put them on the shelf.
options: books were lying on the table
questions.explanation: **'Lying'** (Gerund/Present Participle) का प्रयोग Adjective के रूप में होगा.

questions.question: Q84. He is over eighty and dare not read without glasses.
questions.explanation: **अक्षमता (Inability)** बताने के लिए **'can not'** Modal Verb का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q85. You are welcome to partake this light refreshment.
questions.explanation: **'Partake of'** का अर्थ है **'थोड़ा हिस्सा लेना'** (to take a portion of).

questions.question: Q86. I have been wondering at taking skating as a hobby.
questions.explanation: Verb 'wonder' के साथ **'about'** Preposition का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q87. He's not so friendly like she is.
questions.explanation: Negative Comparison में **'so...as'** Conjunction का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q88. I imagine you have learnt a valuable lesson from this experience, didn't you?
questions.explanation: Question Tag का नियम: Statement (have learnt-Present Perfect) Positive है, इसलिए Tag **Negative (haven't you?)** होगा.

questions.question: Q89. My father was always ordering about my sister.
questions.explanation: Adverb **'about'** को Noun **'sister'** के बाद रखा जाएगा.

questions.question: Q90. I can't make out my mind about taking a vacation in winter.
questions.explanation: **"Make up one's mind"** (निर्णय लेना) सही Idiom है.

questions.question: Q91. There are a bit nice shops in the town centre.
questions.explanation: Plural Noun **'shops'** से पहले **'a bit'** गलत है. **'Far nicer'** (काफी बेहतर) सही है.

questions.question: Q92. Would you have been so kind as to close the window?
questions.explanation: **विनम्र अनुरोध (Polite Request)** के लिए **'Would you be'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q93. Often it makes one wonder at the sights you see.
questions.explanation: Subject **'one'** के अनुरूप **Pronoun 'one'** और **Singular Verb 'sees'** का प्रयोग होगा.

questions.question: Q94. It is quite difficult to make on what this doctor writes.
questions.explanation: **"Make out"** (समझ पाना) Phrasal Verb का प्रयोग होगा, जिसका अर्थ है **'to understand with difficulty'**.

questions.question: Q95. Whom was the person that you wanted me to contact there?
questions.explanation: Subjective Pronoun **'Who'** का प्रयोग होगा, क्योंकि यह Verb 'was' का Subject है.

questions.question: Q96. I don't fancy to go out this evening.
questions.explanation: Verb **'fancy'** के बाद **Gerund ($V_{ing}$)** का प्रयोग होता है.

questions.question: Q97. Do I need finish this work today itself?
questions.explanation: **'Need'** का प्रयोग **Modal Auxiliary** के रूप में होने पर **Inversion (Need + I + V1)** होता है.

questions.question: Q98. The news about the surge in Covid-19 cases is broadcasted every morning.
questions.explanation: Verb **'broadcast'** की Past form **'broadcast'** ही होती है; 'News' Singular है, इसलिए **'is broadcast'** सही है.

questions.question: Q99. Is this the same book like our teacher recommended?
questions.explanation: **'Same'** के साथ **'as'** Conjunction का प्रयोग होता है (Same...as).

questions.question: Q100. Megha's habit of procrastination puts her colleagues on lot of trouble.
questions.explanation: **"Put someone into trouble"** सही Idiom है. **'A lot of'** (बहुत सारा) सही है.
